narrative:
Lake 6 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,213 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
